channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Mexico vs South Africa: Mexico by 2 (81%)
item.description: Group A, 2026-06-11, Mexico City. Mexico 81% / draw 14% / South Africa 5%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: South Korea vs Czech Republic: South Korea by 1 (48%)
item.description: Group A, 2026-06-11, Zapopan. South Korea 48% / draw 27% / Czech Republic 25%. Predicted margin 1.
